zh.lifeSummary: 當King Brian Sreamhach Ó Briain King of Thomond於大約1355年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 克萊爾恩尼斯時，他的父親Mathghamhain Maonmhaighe Ó Briain King of Thomond42歲，母親Úna Ní Conchubhair, Queen of Thomond27歲。他於1394年與Slaine MacNamara在愛爾蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他於1369年登記服兵役。他去世於1400年在他的家鄉享年46歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 克萊爾恩尼斯恩尼斯 1。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当King Brian Sreamhach Ó Briain King of Thomond于大约1355年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 克萊爾恩尼斯时，他的父亲Mathghamhain Maonmhaighe Ó Briain King of Thomond42岁，母亲Úna Ní Conchubhair, Queen of Thomond27岁。他于1394年与Slaine MacNamara在爱尔兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他于1369年登记服兵役。他去世于1400年在他的家乡享年46岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 克萊爾恩尼斯恩尼斯 1。

nameMeanings.name: Ó
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

variants.name: Oh
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

nameMeanings.name: Briain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Brittain  .

variants.name: Brittain
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Anglo-Norman French Bretagne, Bretaign(e) ‘Brittany’. Some of the modern forms are from the Middle English Brytane, Brittan ‘Breton’; compare Breton .

nameMeanings.name: Brian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Irish origin: perhaps from an Old Celtic word meaning ‘high’ or ‘noble’. The name has been perennially popular in Ireland, in particular on account of the fame of Brian Boru (Gaelic Brian Bóroimhe) ( c. 940–1014 ), a warrior who was credited with driving the Vikings from Ireland and who eventually became high king of Ireland. In the Middle Ages it was relatively common in East Anglia, where it was introduced by Breton settlers, and in northern England, where it was introduced by Scandinavians from Ireland. It was quite popular in Yorkshire in the early 16th century, largely because it had long been a family name among the Stapletons, who had Irish connections. They first used it after Sir Gilbert Stapleton married Agnes , the daughter of the great northern baron Sir Brian fitzAlan . In Gaelic Scotland it was at first borne exclusively by members of certain professional families of Irish origin.

variants.name: Bryan
meanings: Variant of   Brian  , influenced by the usual spelling of the associated surname.

en.lifeSummary: When King Brian Sreamhach Ó Briain King of Thomond was born about 1355, in Ennis, County Clare, Ireland, his father, Mathghamhain Maonmhaighe Ó Briain King of Thomond, was 42 and his mother, Úna Ní Conchubhair, Queen of Thomond, was 27. He married Slaine MacNamara in 1394, in Ireland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He registered for military service in 1369. He died in 1400, in his hometown, at the age of 46, and was buried in Ennis 1, Ennis, County Clare, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque King Brian Sreamhach Ó Briain King of Thomond est né environ 1355, à Ennis, County Clare, Irlande, son père, Mathghamhain Maonmhaighe Ó Briain King of Thomond, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Úna Ní Conchubhair, Queen of Thomond, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Slaine MacNamara en 1394, à Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1369. Il est décédé en 1400, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à Ennis 1, Ennis, County Clare, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als King Brian Sreamhach Ó Briain King of Thomond um 1355 in Ennis, County Clare, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Mathghamhain Maonmhaighe Ó Briain King of Thomond 42 und seine Mutter Úna Ní Conchubhair, Queen of Thomond 27. Er hat 1394 in Irland Slaine MacNamara geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er hat sich 1369 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb 1400 im Alter von 46 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Ennis 1, Ennis, County Clare, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando King Brian Sreamhach Ó Briain King of Thomond è nato il circa 1355 nel Ennis, County Clare, Irlanda, il suo padre, Mathghamhain Maonmhaighe Ó Briain King of Thomond, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Úna Ní Conchubhair, Queen of Thomond, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Slaine MacNamara nel 1394, nel Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1369. Morì nel 1400, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolto a Ennis 1, Ennis, County Clare, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: King Brian Sreamhach Ó Briain King of Thomondが約1355年にアイルランドコウントイ クラーエニスで生まれた時，父Mathghamhain Maonmhaighe Ó Briain King of Thomondは42歳，母Úna Ní Conchubhair, Queen of Thomondは27歳であった。1394年にアイルランドでSlaine MacNamaraと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1369年に兵役登録をした。彼は1400年に故郷で46歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ クラーエニスエニス 1にて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: King Brian Sreamhach Ó Briain King of Thomond(이)가 대략 1355년 아일랜드 카운티 클래르 니스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Mathghamhain Maonmhaighe Ó Briain King of Thomond(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Úna Ní Conchubhair, Queen of Thomond(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1394년 아일랜드에서 Slaine MacNamara(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1369년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1400년 그의 고향에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 클래르 니스 니스 1에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando King Brian Sreamhach Ó Briain King of Thomond nasceu aproximadamente 1355, em Ennis, County Clare, Irlanda, seu pai, Mathghamhain Maonmhaighe Ó Briain King of Thomond, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Úna Ní Conchubhair, Queen of Thomond, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Slaine MacNamara em 1394, em Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1369. Ele faleceu em 1400, em sua cidade natal, com 46 anos, e foi sepultado em Ennis 1, Ennis, County Clare, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда King Brian Sreamhach Ó Briain King of Thomond родился около 1355 г. в местности эннис, коунти клар, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Mathghamhain Maonmhaighe Ó Briain King of Thomond было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Úna Ní Conchubhair, Queen of Thomond, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Slaine MacNamara в 1394 г. в местности Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. В 1369 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1400 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности эннис 1, эннис, коунти клар, Ирландия.

sm.from 1369 to 1400: mai le 1369 e o'o I le 1400

es.lifeSummary: Cuando King Brian Sreamhach Ó Briain King of Thomond nació aproximadamente 1355, en Ennis, County Clare, Irlanda, su papá, Mathghamhain Maonmhaighe Ó Briain King of Thomond, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Úna Ní Conchubhair, Queen of Thomond, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Slaine MacNamara en 1394, en Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1369. Murió en 1400, en su pueblo, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultado en Ennis 1, Ennis, County Clare, Irlanda.
